title: CTOV - Villagers Plus Compat
description: Compatibility datapack between ChoiceTheorem's overhauled village and VillagersPlus mod
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and VillagerPlus. You will find worksites in villages. 1.19+ datapack is for both Forge and Fabric.

**VillagerPlus mod**

VillagerPlus mod for fabric can be obtained [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/villagersplus)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
